problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
